ai.title: India's IT Sector Shows Signs Of Recovery, Growth Outlook Improves: Report
ai.description: BNP Paribas report says India’s IT sector outlook has improved, driven by steady hiring, cloud adoption and supportive currency movements. It expects modest Q4 FY26 performance with sequential growth and stronger FY27–FY28 earnings estimates. Large-cap firms are likely to remain stable, while midcap players may lead growth, alongside rising AI adoption across global partnerships overall.

ai.title: Apple's AI Chief John Giannandrea Departs This Week
ai.description: John Giannandrea, Apple's former head of artificial intelligence, is set to leave the company this week as his final stock vesting date approaches. In his "Power On" newsletter, Mark Gurman noted that Giannandrea's exit has been a prolonged one. Apple moved to dramatically reduce his role in March 2025 following the disappointing launch of Apple Intelligence and ongoing delays to the Siri overhaul, stripping him of oversight of Siri, robotics, and other AI teams at that time.
